JavaScript

JavaScript

```
import ContextDev from 'context.dev';

const client = new ContextDev({
  apiKey: process.env['CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY'], // This is the default and can be omitted
});

const brand = await client.brand.retrieve({ domain: 'domain' });

console.log(brand.brand);
```

# Retrieve brand data by domain

Copy page

Retrieve logos, backdrops, colors, industry, description, and more from any domain

GET

/

brand

/

retrieve

JavaScript

```
import ContextDev from 'context.dev';

const client = new ContextDev({
  apiKey: process.env['CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY'], // This is the default and can be omitted
});

const brand = await client.brand.retrieve({ domain: 'domain' });

console.log(brand.brand);
```

10 Credits

#### Authorizations

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#authorization-authorization)

Authorization

string

header

required

Bearer authentication header of the form `Bearer <token>`, where `<token>` is your auth token.

#### Query Parameters

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#parameter-domain)

domain

string

required

Domain name to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com'). Cannot be used with name or ticker parameters.

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#parameter-force-language)

force\_language

enum<string>

Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

Available options:

`afrikaans`,

`albanian`,

`amharic`,

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#parameter-max-speed)

maxSpeed

boolean

Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data. Works with all three lookup methods.

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#parameter-max-age-ms)

maxAgeMs

integer

default:7776000000

Maximum age in milliseconds for cached brand data before the API performs a hard refresh. Defaults to 3 months (7776000000 ms). Values below 1 day (86400000 ms) are clamped to 1 day; values above 1 year (31536000000 ms) are clamped to 1 year.

Required range: `86400000 <= x <= 31536000000`

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#parameter-timeout-ms)

timeoutMS

integer

Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

Required range: `1000 <= x <= 300000`

#### Response

200

application/json

Successful response

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#response-status)

status

string

Status of the response, e.g., 'ok'

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#response-brand)

brand

object

Detailed brand information

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.context.dev/api-reference/brand-intelligence/retrieve-brand-data-by-domain#response-code)

code

integer

HTTP status code
